criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The breadth and depth of AI-driven features offered by the app, including but not limited to natural language processing, machine learning, and automation capabilities.

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: Aggregated feedback from users on app stores and other platforms, reflecting user satisfaction and perceived value.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent to which the app can seamlessly integrate with other commonly used tools and platforms, enhancing workflow and productivity.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The ability of the app to adapt to individual user preferences and provide tailored experiences.

criteria.name: Pricing
criteria.description: The cost-effectiveness of the app, considering both free and paid versions, and the value provided relative to the price.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Multiple sources
